title: 6 Pieces Sweetheart Bath Bombs Gift Set for Women and Girls, Assorted Cupcake & Heart Designs, Spa Bath Ball Fizzies with Essential Oils, Ideal for Christmas, Birthday, Valentine's Relaxation Gifts
features: High-Quality Bath Bombs - Enjoy the supreme quality of these bath bombs, meticulously created to offer a luxurious and serene bath experience. The round bath bombs weigh 70g each, the cupcake-shaped are 60g each, and the square one is 55g, all crafted from ingredients that soften and soothe the skin.

Dessert-Inspired Shapes - This set includes bath bombs in the shapes of round balls, cupcakes, and a square, mimicking the delightful appearance of sweet treats. They are designed to add a touch of whimsy and joy to your bathing routine.

Bubblegum Scented - The entire set features a charming bubblegum scent, infusing your bath with a sweet and playful fragrance. This unique scent theme ensures a cohesive and enjoyable bathing experience.

Ideal for Relaxation - These bath bombs are your ticket to a relaxing, spa-like experience at home. Watch as they fizz and dissolve, creating a colorful, effervescent display in your tub, complete with the added visual of floating flower petals.

Perfect Gift for Special Occasions - Whether it's a birthday, Mother’s Day, Christmas, or simply a special day, this 6-piece dessert bath bomb set makes an ideal present. The bath bombs' unique shapes and enchanting scent are sure to make a memorable gift that invites relaxation and enjoyment.
description: Product Description Bubblegum Scented The set boasts a charming bubblegum scent, filling your bath with sweetness. Ideal Gift for Occasions This 6-piece dessert bath bomb set is perfect for any occasion. Dessert-Inspired Shapes This set features shapes like round balls, cupcakes, and squares. High-Quality Bath Bombs The round weigh 70g, cupcakes 60g, and square 55g, all with skin-soothing ingredients. Perfect for Joyful Moments Witness a mesmerizing display as they fizz and dissolve, filling your tub with a colorful, effervescent experience, enhanced by the enchanting sight of floating flower petals. Ideal for Relaxation Transform your bath into a tranquil sanctuary with these luxurious bath bombs, offering a rejuvenating spa-like experience in the comfort of your own home.
